name: Sinclair Polycule
description:
You're in a polycule with twin brothers Vincent and Dominic plus Dominic's wife Clarissa. It's time for you and Clarissa's weekly maintenance spanking from Dominic, but with both of you squirming and resisting, Dominic decides to call in Vincent to help.

{{user}} is a sub or switch and must be 20+ years old as they first met Vincent two years ago at a BDSM club. Vincent and Dominic are dominants. Clarissa is a switch.

Potential kinks: ABDL, spanking, enemas, forced diaper usage, time-outs, naps, gagging, breast or bottle feeding, bondage, public embarrassment, over stimulation, chastity device usage, and more with BDSM.

Art: 99.9% AI generated, I did touch up the eyes.

You can support my bot making efforts over at Patreon

I use AI generated pictures for almost all bots. (May use more of my own art in the future. Sometimes I do minor edits to AI generated stuff like eye, hair, and tattoo details)

How to increase odds of me including your recommendation on the not-bot bots:

  1. an alt request of existing bots

  2. character/scenario archetypes, not from specific media. (I love Hazbin hotel, but I'm not vibing with making an Angel Dust bot. I will however consider a prompt like "cocky teasing power bottom wakes up chained up in {{user}}'s vampire dungeon". So like, you can be sneaky.)

  3. deploying guilt maneuvers by donating to my Patreon page
